data.current_description: Retrieve statistical data for a specific measure across countries or regions. Measures include rates of gun homicide, gun suicide, gun ownership, and other firearm-related statistics.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve statistical data for a specific firearm-related measure across countries or regions. Accepts a measure parameter (e.g., gun homicide rate, gun suicide rate, gun ownership) and optional filtering parameters for region, year range, and data type. Returns an array of DataPoint objects containing measure values, regional data, and temporal information for the specified criteria.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description provides good context about measure types but lacks clarity on input parameters (filtering options) and output structure.
